description.ko: 고밀도 유리를 통해 굴절되는 빛의 흐름을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 복잡한 데이터를 명확하고 찬란한 스펙트럼으로 정제하는 PRISM-2의 변혁적 능력을 상징합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light bending through high-density glass, symbolizing the transformative power of PRISM-2 in refining complex data into a brilliant spectrum of clarity.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a geometric glass prism refracting a single beam of pure white light into a vivid, glowing rainbow spectrum. Hyper-realistic details, intricate caustic light patterns dancing on a minimalist surface, prismatic dispersion, sharp edges, 8k resolution, ray tracing, ethereal atmosphere, dark background to emphasize color brilliance.
